form-horizontal","object":{"$type":"AssociationObjectProperty","dataSourceId":"27.10","scope":"$SearchObject","editable":true},"emptyMessage":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"body":[{"$widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.container1","widget":"Container","props":{"class":"mx-name-container1","style":{"backgroundColor":"pink"},"renderMode":"div","onClick":null,"content":[{"$widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.text1","widget":"Text","props":{"class":"mx-name-text1","style":{"color":"red"},"caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Note：When 0px"},"control":[{"$widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.textArea3","widget":"TextArea","props":{"inputValue":{"$type":"AttributeProperty","scope":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.dataView1","path":"","entity":"TinySqlStudio2.SearchObject","attribute":"Sql","onChange":{"type":"doNothing","argMap":{},"config":{},"disabledDuringExecution":false},"isList":false,"validation":{"message":"This statement"},"args":{}}},"readOnlyStyle":"text","onEnter":null,"onLeave":null,"ariaRequired":true,"submitWhileEditing":false,"submitDelay":300,"id":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.textArea3"}}}],"labelFor":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.textArea3"},"width":4,"orientation":"vertical","hasError":{"$type":"ValidationProperty","inputWidgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.textArea3"}}},{"$widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.actionButton1$visibility","widget":"ConditionalVisibilityWrapper","props":{"visible":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"function","name":"_hasSomeRole","parameters":[{"type":"literal","value":"Administrator"}]},"args":{}}},"contents":[{"$widgetId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.actionButton1","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"27.TinySqlStudio2.UpdateData.actionButton1","class":"mx-name-actionButton1","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"execute"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"callMicroflow","argMap":{"SqlEntity":{"widget":"$SearchObject","source":"object"}},"config":{"operationId":"3lfirf9EOVivIQM4FPW+Ew","validate":"view","confirmation":{"question":"Do
